planSteps.description: Navigate directly to https://course-platform-theta-two.vercel.app/content/1 without adding any course to cart or completing checkout
Verify that a success enrollment message appears saying the user is subscribed even though no purchase was made
Click the button that says اشتري دلوقتي which is the Buy Now button
Verify that nothing happens when the Buy Now button is clicked - no navigation, no modal, no response of any kind
Click the button that says اضف للسلة to add the course to the cart
Leave the name and email fields completely empty and click the checkout submit button
Verify that the checkout process completes successfully even though name and email fields were left empty
Verify that the subscribed badge appears in the navbar showing the user as subscribed even though no valid payment was made
